name: Kolowalu Park Playground
tagline: Oahu's first inclusive playground — ramps, sensory panels, accessible swings for every kid.
bestTime: Late afternoon when it cools down; mornings on weekends before it gets busy
talkStory: Fully ADA-accessible with ramps, sensory panels, and adaptive swings — one of the only playgrounds on the island designed for kids of all abilities. Dog park right next door if you have a pup. Located in Ward Village, Kakaako — combine with lunch at one of the nearby restaurants. Rubber ground surface stays cooler than sand playgrounds.
